title: Orbital Strike
description: Adds the ability to summon Orbital Strikes inspired by Star Wars Battlefront
body:
# Orbital Strike

This is A datapack that was made simply for fun. It attempts to introduce the Star Wars Battlefront Orbital Strike that lets you destroy everything in an area using a TNT barrage from the sky!

## How to use

- Drop a regular bow and a lodestone (as items) on top of a fletching table and wait a moment to get an Orbital Strike bow.
- Shoot the bow at any solid block (can't hit an entity, it won't activate) and watch the TNT rain down!
